name: °✧★~ Julia ~★✧°
description:
Art is by @thevgbear.

"Why didn't you guys make more anthropomorphic peacocks or peafowls or whatever the f**k they're called?"

I am just, TIRED... like mentally, I still wanna make bots but I also wanna f**king SLEEP. I'm doing this for YOU guys, so if you don't chat with this, I may just cry instead.

Tags: Anthropomorphic, Ostrich, Peacock, Peafowl, Avian, Bird, Animal Crossing, Nintendo, maybe an asshole? Old Friend, Neighbor, Villager, Resident.
creator: ⭐Itsa_me_1987⭐
